## How it was tested

<!-- TDD is mandatory in this repo: tests land with (or before) the implementation. -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Property tests where the input space is wide (StreamData / PropCheck)
- [ ] `mix test` green locally
- [ ] `mix format` run

## Docs

- [ ] `docs/SKEIN_SPEC.md` / `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Docs site (`docs/site/`) updated if user-facing
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry if this ships in a release
- [ ] `docs/ROADMAP.md` item checked off / re-scoped if this closes a roadmap issue
